notes: Bucket A (provider 5xx AFTER partial stream): claudecode's runtime writes a synthesized error message — 'API Error: API returned an empty or malformed response (HTTP 200)' — with a terminal stop_reason. IsAgentDone() fires via classifier rule 2b; session returns to ready cleanly. The recording is driven by tools/agent-onboarding/recording/record-turn-aborted-by-error.sh which launches claude --bare against tools/agent-onboarding/recording/mock-anthropic-5xx/main.go (mid-stream `event: error` overloaded_error). Bucket B (silent network drop, no transcript epilogue) and Bucket C (system/turn_duration on abnormal exit) remain documented gaps — see assessment.json caveats. The phase shape mirrors basic-turn's because the visible contract is the same: session_birth ready, turn arc working→ready without sticking.

text: User prompt drives ready → working before the API error lands
Synthesized error epilogue (terminal stop_reason) drives working → ready; state does not stick in working
